libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For version 5.0.0, use Jackson 3 package names in test code. Import tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode or tools.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode instead of com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode; the upstream 5.0.0 docs and bytecode show SchemaGenerator.generateSchema() returning Jackson 3 ObjectNode/JsonNode types.

deterministic_setup.reason: jsonschema-module-swagger-2 is applied through SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder/SchemaGenerator, but the module POM declares jsonschema-generator with provided scope.
The module derives schema attributes from @Schema and @ArraySchema, but swagger-annotations is declared with provided scope; 2.2.41 is the version managed by the 5.0.0 parent POM.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 4.38.0 tests import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode; carrying that import forward causes the javac failure shown in the issue.
Using an older Swagger annotations dependency may compile for simple annotations but can drift from the version the 5.0.0 module was compiled and tested against.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The artifact is a VicTools module, not the standalone generator. Its POM marks both the core jsonschema-generator and Swagger 2 annotations as provided, while the documented meaningful use is to register Swagger2Module with SchemaGenerator and annotate model classes with io.swagger.v3 annotations.
